summary: Tested 3 new features: Beta Registration Modal (blocking overlay, form validation, registration flow), Prometheus Metrics endpoint (/api/metrics), and Broker Integration (/api/brokers + BrokersTab UI). All features working correctly.

issues: WebSocket connection warnings appearing in console (non-blocking, just reconnection attempts)

seed_data_creation: Beta registration created during testing with test data: first_name='Test', last_name='User', email='test@example.com', ssn_last4='1234', address in CA
context_for_next_testing_agent: Beta registration is currently registered. To test the blocking modal again, delete from beta_registrations collection in MongoDB. All 6 brokers are 'Coming Soon' with supported=False. Risk levels: HIGH (robinhood, webull, wealthsimple), MEDIUM (schwab, fidelity), LOW (ibkr).

beta_registration_modal.blocking_overlay: Modal blocks app access until registration

form_validation.empty_fields: Shows 'First name, last name, and email are required.' error
form_validation.invalid_ssn: Shows 'Last 4 of SSN must be exactly 4 digits.' error (backend validated)
form_validation.agreement_not_accepted: Shows 'You must accept the Beta Tester Agreement.' error

beta_registration_modal.submit_flow: POST /api/beta/register called, dashboard shown after success

api_endpoints.GET /api/brokers: Returns array of 6 brokers with id, name, description, supported, auth_fields, docs_url, risk_warning

frontend_brokers_tab.location: New 'Brokers' tab in dashboard tab bar
ui_elements: Broker cards with name and description
